scripts.db:push:neon: node scripts/use-postgres-schema.mjs && prisma db push && node scripts/restore-sqlite-schema.mjs
scripts.db:seed:neon: node scripts/use-postgres-schema.mjs && tsx prisma/seed.ts && node scripts/restore-sqlite-schema.mjs
scripts.db:setup:neon: node scripts/use-postgres-schema.mjs && prisma db push && tsx prisma/seed.ts && node scripts/restore-sqlite-schema.mjs
scripts.test: node scripts/prepare-test-prisma.mjs && vitest run && node scripts/restore-dev-prisma.mjs
scripts.test:unit: node scripts/prepare-test-prisma.mjs && vitest run tests/unit && node scripts/restore-dev-prisma.mjs
scripts.test:integration: node scripts/prepare-test-prisma.mjs && vitest run tests/integration && node scripts/restore-dev-prisma.mjs
scripts.test:coverage: node scripts/prepare-test-prisma.mjs && vitest run --coverage && node scripts/restore-dev-prisma.mjs
scripts.test:all: node scripts/prepare-test-prisma.mjs && vitest run && playwright test && node scripts/restore-dev-prisma.mjs
